module:
Chunking services for breaking text into smaller pieces for embedding.

This module provides services for chunking text content into smaller pieces
that fit within embedding model token limits while preserving context.

ChunkingService.docstring:
Service responsible for chunking text content into smaller pieces
    that fit within embedding model token limits while preserving context.

__init__.docstring:
Initialize the chunking service with a specific tokenizer.
        
        Args:
            tokenizer_name: Name of the tiktoken tokenizer to use
            max_tokens: Maximum tokens per chunk (defaults to settings)

chunk_text.docstring:
Split text into chunks that don't exceed token limit.
        
        Args:
            text: Text to chunk
            max_tokens: Maximum tokens per chunk (overrides instance setting)
            max_chunks: Maximum number of chunks to return (None for unlimited)
            
        Returns:
            List of dictionaries with text chunks and token counts

_chunk_text_by_chars.docstring:
Fallback method that chunks text by character count when tokenizer is not available.
        
        Args:
            text: Text to chunk
            char_limit: Maximum characters per chunk
            max_chunks: Maximum number of chunks to return (None for unlimited)
            
        Returns:
            List of dictionaries with text chunks

chunk_with_context.docstring:
Create chunks with overlapping context to maintain coherence.
        
        Args:
            text: Text to chunk (assumed to be line-based like code)
            context_lines: Number of context lines to preserve
            max_chunks: Maximum number of chunks to return (None for unlimited)
            
        Returns:
            List of dictionaries with content and context

process_model_field.docstring:
Process a specific field of a model instance, creating chunks.
        
        Args:
            model_instance: The model instance to process
            field_name: Name of the field to chunk
            chunk_model_name: Name of the model to store chunks in
            max_chunks: Maximum number of chunks to create (None for unlimited)
            
        Returns:
            List of created chunk instances
